latestValidationChecks.criterion: 신탁 메시지 → Gemini 분류 → 유형(강화/방해/유혹) + 대상 추출
latestValidationChecks.evidence: oracle/intent.js extractOracleIntent() calls Gemini with structured prompt returning buff/debuff/lure classification and actionOverride; keyword fallback included.

latestValidationChecks.criterion: credulity 판정: 성공 시 override_queue에 삽입, 다음 턴 AI 행동에 반영
latestValidationChecks.evidence: oracle/credulity.js rolls Math.random()*100 < credulity for debuff/lure; on success pushOverride() inserts into Redis game:match:{id}:override_queue. turn-scheduler.js consumes overrides via popCharacterOverrides() before evaluateAction().

latestValidationChecks.criterion: 쿨다운: 동일 플레이어 분당 1회 초과 시 거부 응답
latestValidationChecks.evidence: oracle/routes.js lines 87-93: Redis key oracle:cooldown:{userId}:{matchId} with EX=60s; returns HTTP 429 with remaining TTL on violation.

latestValidationChecks.criterion: 포인트 부족 시 신탁 거부, 포인트 차감 정확성 검증
latestValidationChecks.evidence: routes.js returns HTTP 402 when points < 5; oracle/points.js deductOracleCost() uses atomic UPDATE ... WHERE constellation_points >= 5 RETURNING to prevent race conditions. Survival +1/turn, win +5, dramatic reversal awarded from turn-scheduler.

latestValidationChecks.criterion: DB migration: credulity column added to characters
latestValidationChecks.evidence: server/migrations/003_oracle_credulity.sql: ALTER TABLE characters ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS credulity INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 50; redis-state.js carries credulity into character state.

latestValidationChecks.criterion: Node.js syntax validation on all new oracle files
latestValidationChecks.evidence: node --check on all 5 new oracle files, turn-scheduler.js, and app.js returned exit 0 with ALL OK.

validationChecks.criterion: 신탁 메시지 → Gemini 분류 → 유형(강화/방해/유혹) + 대상 추출
validationChecks.evidence: server/src/oracle/intent.js: extractOracleIntent() calls Gemini with a structured prompt that classifies buff/debuff/lure and returns actionOverride. Keyword fallback included for environments without GEMINI_API_KEY.

validationChecks.criterion: credulity 판정: 성공 시 override_queue에 삽입, 다음 턴 AI 행동에 반영
validationChecks.evidence: oracle/credulity.js: buff always succeeds; debuff/lure rolls Math.random()*100 < credulity. On success routes.js calls pushOverride() into Redis LIST game:match:{id}:override_queue. turn-scheduler.js calls popCharacterOverrides() per character before evaluateAction(), applying override instead of AI decision.

validationChecks.criterion: 쿨다운: 동일 플레이어 분당 1회 초과 시 거부 응답
validationChecks.evidence: oracle/routes.js lines 87-93: Redis key oracle:cooldown:{userId}:{matchId} with EX=60s checked before processing; returns HTTP 429 with remaining TTL if set.

validationChecks.criterion: 포인트 부족 시 신탁 거부, 포인트 차감 정확성 검증
validationChecks.evidence: routes.js: fast check req.user.constellation_points < 5 returns 402. oracle/points.js deductOracleCost() uses atomic UPDATE ... WHERE constellation_points >= 5 RETURNING, throwing if no row updated. Survival +1/turn, win +5, dramatic reversal +15 (5+10) in awardSurvivalPoints/awardWinPoints called from turn-scheduler.

validationChecks.criterion: DB migration: credulity column added to characters
validationChecks.evidence: server/migrations/003_oracle_credulity.sql: ALTER TABLE characters ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS credulity INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 50. match-routes.js participant query updated to include c.credulity; redis-state.js buildInitialState carries it into character state.
node --check on all 5 new oracle files + turn-scheduler.js + app.js all returned exit 0 with 'ALL OK'.
